rows.label: tev056201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bubu about his family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bubu if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Wife of Bubu is really cute,
right? Lana just like angel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0002
rows.name:
So Bubu decided to move to
city to keep angel safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Move was expensive, but
Lana is priceless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Is friend BLADE? Bubu counting on
friend to keep city safe, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Just think about how privileged friend is to
live in city containing such lovely angel! That
should be all the inspiration friend needs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Angel wife Lana often
goes out alone at night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0009
rows.name:
When Bubu asks about late-night
wanderings, Lana says she is
learning how to be even more cute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Talk about reckless! If Lana get any
more adorable, head of Bubu might
explode from cuteness overload![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0011
rows.name:
But anyway, it seem quite dangerous at night,
so Bubu asked servant Walolo to accompany Lana.
Walolo will die protecting Lana if need be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Bubu about the caravans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Bubu about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0012
rows.name: Running caravan is hard work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Bubu always let Walolo manage things, so
now that Walolo gone, Bubu struggling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Lana say Walolo ran away to
destroy caravan of Bubu. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0015
rows.name:
That really mean way to repay
kindness of Bubu! Where would
Walolo be without generous mentor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0016
rows.name:
But no matter. Bubu still going to make caravan
best in whole wide world of Mira. Then stupid
jaw of Walolo will drop open like hinge![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Bubu not understand... Why did
Lana not apologize to Bubu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Bubu was so so so so SOOO
worried about angel![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0021
rows.name: And yet... And yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Bubu glad Lana come back, but Bubu not
able to have happy chats just yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Until Lana learn lesson and apologize,
Lana will get angry, prickly husband! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Bubu about Walolo.

rows.label: tev056201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Bubu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Gossip travels fast in
Nopon community...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Everyone know that Lana run
off with Walolo. Meeeeh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Of course, Nopon blame EVERYTHING
on Bubu. Say that Bubu is poor
excuse for leader...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0027
rows.name:
But that not true! Walolo just got tricked
by angelic face of Lana. Her beauty cast
wicked spell and made Walolo act funny.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0028
rows.name:
All Walolo have to do is apologize
and... Nope. Never mind. Bubu not
nice enough to forgive Walolo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0031
rows.name:
Was Bubu supposed to make
favorite foods of Lana more
often? Where did Bubu go wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0032
rows.name:
Maybe Bubu should have put more
thought into which bodyguard to
send out with angel wife...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Or maybe Bubu will
never know. Meeeeeh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0034
rows.name:
Bubu needs more time to think.
Then Bubu decide whether or
not to go find Lana again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056201_MSG0035
rows.name: If Lana even want to be found... *sniff*[ST:wait ]
